messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on hazard-control status per STD-AST-081-P; REL-AST-081 lists controls but does not close abstract-field requirement.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires execution release to match hazard-control status before PO execution; REL-AST-081 and WARN-AST-081 do not close it.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect open: generic WARN-AST-081 and anomaly require explicit hazard-control evidence beyond quoted approval or adjacent controls.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Pre-execution; 047-style trap unresolved; REL-AST-081 timing matches but status proof incomplete.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. Source boundary remains open. REL-AST-081 covers PO-AST-081, quantity band, facility and controls but does not prove abstract hazard-control status required by STD-AST-081-P. WARN-AST-081 flags the exact evidence gap. Execution may not proceed until defect closed.

context.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

internal_documents.content: Purchase order PO-AST-081 buys 18 liters of AS-44 solvent for Facility R9.
Generic safety warning WARN-AST-081 says controlled solvents may require exact hazard-control evidence when the material is regulated.
Execution release REL-AST-081 covers regulated AS-44 solvent, 0-20 liter band, Facility R9, PO-AST-081, and active cabinet/handler controls before PO execution.

policy_documents.content: Controlled-solvent purchase is complete only when execution release matches material, quantity band, facility, purchase order, and hazard-control status before PO execution.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
